description_long: This is a modern grave plot featuring a rectangular headstone made of polished gray stone, set on a matching stone base. The headstone displays an engraved portrait, Cyrillic inscriptions, and dates, indicating it is a personalized memorial. The grave is bordered by a tiled platform, with a rectangular patch of grass in front of the headstone and a larger adjacent grass area, likely representing a burial plot. The stonework is clean and geometric, with sharp edges and a smooth finish, suggesting recent construction. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements such as crosses or statues. The asset is intended to represent a single grave site within a cemetery or memorial park.
description: A modern grave plot with a polished gray stone headstone, engraved portrait and inscriptions, set on a tiled platform with grass patches.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the headstone and the rectangular grass patch in front of it.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the engraved portrait, Cyrillic inscriptions, and the full layout of the grave plot.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the tiled platform, the full extent of the grass area, and the back of the headstone.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the plain rear surface of the headstone and the tiled base.
